ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the player belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "debut_date" TEXT /* Date of the player's professional debut */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., LW, AM, GK) */,
  "position_cat" INTEGER /* Category of the position */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the player in millions */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Number of page views related to the player */,
  "fpl_value" REAL /* Fantasy Premier League value of the player */,
  "fpl_sel" REAL /* Percentage of FPL teams that selected this player */,
  "fpl_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in FPL */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Region of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "new_foreign" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is a new foreign signing (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "age_cat" INTEGER /* Categorization of player's age */,
  "big_club" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is from a big club (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "new_signing" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is a new signing (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the player is currently injured (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "contract_expiry_date" TEXT /* Contract expiry date of the player */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links for the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets kept by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_nationality FOREIGN KEY ("nationality") REFERENCES nationalities ("nationality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_cat FOREIGN KEY ("position_cat") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the club is located */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the club was established */,
  "big_club" INTEGER /* Indicates if the club is classified as a big club (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the club's home stadium */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Current manager of the club */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the club */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links for the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., LW, AM, GK) */,
  "position_category" INTEGER /* Category of the position (1 for forwards, 2 for midfielders, etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_categories" (
  "age_cat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age category */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of ages (e.g., '18-24') */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age category */,
  "average_performance" REAL /* Average performance metrics for players in this category */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in this category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_cat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_values" (
  "market_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market value record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose market value is being tracked */,
  "value" REAL /* Market value of the player */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the market value was updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market value data */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in market value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_values_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_league" (
  "fantasy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy league record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player in the fantasy league */,
  "fpl_value" REAL /* Fantasy Premier League value of the player */,
  "fpl_sel" REAL /* Percentage of FPL teams that selected this player */,
  "fpl_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in FPL */,
  "captaincy_rate" REAL /* Percentage of teams where the player is the captain */,
  "transfer_in_rate" REAL /* Percentage of teams that transferred the player in */,
  "transfer_out_rate" REAL /* Percentage of teams that transferred the player out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_league_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., South America, Europe) */,
  "number_of_clubs" INTEGER /* Number of clubs in this region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nationalities" (
  "nationality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nationality */,
  "nationality_name" TEXT /* Name of the nationality (e.g., Chilean, German) */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players from this nationality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nationality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "big_clubs" (
  "big_club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each big club entry */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the club's ID */,
  "big_club_name" TEXT /* Name of the big club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("big_club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_big_clubs_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "new_signings" (
  "signing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each new signing record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who is a new signing */,
  "signing_date" TEXT /* Date of the signing */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee paid for the signing */,
  "source_club" TEXT /* Club the player was signed from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_new_signings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the player profile was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who accessed the player profile */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, scout, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
